name: The Informer
tagline: I know what they're carrying. I always do.

mythic_signature.description: Passive: while in play, you can see the opponent's per-card heat contribution breakdown — normally hidden. You know who's holding what, even face-down.
mythic_signature.balance_note: Low offense, respectable defense (R 8). The power is intelligence. Transforms the opponent's information asymmetry into your advantage — but only while alive, so survivability matters.
